title: Kyros Enters the Arena
description: Pages 1–5 focus on kyros enters the arena, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, King Riku, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as kyros's life as Dressrosa's legendary fighter and his bond with King Riku, Scarlet, and Rebecca reveal the human heart behind the toy soldier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: defeating even the mighty mystery warrior "Ricky" who descended like a comet before him!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Over nine years, he has finally achieved a record of three thousand victories, and remains nude- feated!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: The living legend, kyros!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The word "invincible" was created for this man!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Why did you enter yourself without telling me...? King Riku......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have become quite strong thanks to your teaching, have I not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Still, to think that you would hesitate when you realised it was me. Some "Wild Beast" you are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Don't you think this is enough now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: For nine long years, you have shut yourself away in this "Cage".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's time you emerged ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There is something I wish to ask of you.

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros... rather than wallow in regret over your past mistakes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You can spend the rest of your life protecting the lives of others. That is a valid way to live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: One year later.

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Captain Kyros!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros- Saamaaa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, aren't you so terribly popular!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But you are still a murderer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I for one cannot understand why my father saw fit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...to welcome you into his palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: sister, it's not nice to open old wounds....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: And he lets you represent "justice" as a captain in his army, no less!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It's madness, I tell you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You may be able to fool the people of this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: But you can't fool me!! I know you'll show your true colours someday!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Princess of Dressrosa Scarlet (16)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Second Princess (Her little sister) Viola (10)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I forbid you to come near me and my sister, or to lay a finger upon either of us!! Is that clear?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But, sister, this man is actually quite...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Viola! You shouldn't look into such unclean hearts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: ...but I have a duty to protect you both...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: That will not be NECES- SARY!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Princess scarlet has been kid- napped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: pirates!!! It's a pirate attack!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What happened to the guards?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: They've all been defeated!! It's terrible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I...I beg your for- Giveness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Anyone know I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I...I laid a finger upon you...

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: WaaaaaaAAAAAah!!!!H!!! kyros!! I was SO scared!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Aghhh!! I'm so sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Am I dream- ing? What brought this on?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Sister is...cook- ing....!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: You wish to be removed from your position guarding my daughters?!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: You wouldn't have feeling for scarlet by any chance, would you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: N-NO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Though each individ- URL citizen of this country would likely wish you the best...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The people as a whole would never be able to stand for it, considering your history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: That is the way of the masses....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: father!! If I cannot be with him, I will die!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Princess Scarlet...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: A sudden illness...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: How tragic... she would have been a fine queen someday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Apparently someone knows in

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Scarlet... from this day forth, you are no longer of Royal Blood.

summary: Kyros Enters the Arena develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, King Riku, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
